metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_566
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4e shows localisation of WASF1(WAVE1) in puncta, with a preference towards dendritic protrusions and spines, upon over expression of WASF1 through WAVE1-GFP plasmid.. Experimental description: Primary hippocampal neurons, taken from P1 pups and grown on a glia bed for 10-20 days were used (Goldin et al. 2001). Cultures were transfected at the age of 7-8 days in vitro (DIV) and visualized within the following week (11-14 DIV).

14/11/2017 Pim
- Species of the neuronal culture not stated in the paper. Species traced back to rat via PMID:11150335 referenced in the M&M section.
- Overexpressed WAVE1 was of mouse species: " Mouse brain was used to prepare cDNA from which WAVE1, WAVE3, and Nck1"
- Annotation made to the mouse species.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
